info.description: Zero-knowledge secret manager API. Stores and retrieves ciphertext. Never decrypts.
info.title: zEnv API

get.description: Query audit log entries with filters. Requires project_id.
Export filtered audit log entries as a CSV file.

put.description: Rotate vault key: verify current auth key, store new crypto material. O(1) — no item rows touched.

requestBody.description: Current auth proof + new crypto material

get.description: Returns identity, vault setup status, and vault lock state.

put.description: Set recovery_disabled to true or false. When disabled, recovery kit and trusted contact cannot be used.

get.description: Returns the recovery-wrapped DEK so the client can attempt recovery.

put.description: Replaces the recovery-wrapped DEK with a new one. Old recovery words are invalidated.

post.description: Client verified recovery words, unwrapped DEK, set new Vault Key. Submit new crypto material.
Start 72-hour waiting period for trusted contact recovery.
Trusted contact provides DEK re-wrapped with recovering user's ephemeral key.

get.description: Returns which recovery methods are available for this user.

post.description: Wrap DEK with contact's public key and store. Requires unlocked vault.
Store client-generated crypto material and link to authenticated identity.
Verify Auth Key hash (Vault Key proof). Returns wrapped DEK + keypair on success.

get.description: List all organizations the current user is a member of.

post.description: Create an organization. The creating user becomes the owner and is added as an admin member.

get.description: Get a single organization by ID.
List all members of an organization with their roles.

post.description: Add a user to an organization with a specified role.

delete.description: Remove a member from an organization.

get.description: List all projects in an organization.

post.description: Create a project with client-generated crypto material. Project Vault Key shown once at creation, never stored on server.

get.description: Get a single project by ID.
Returns project salt and wrapped Project DEK. SDK uses this to derive Project KEK and unwrap DEK.
List secret metadata (name hash, version, updated_at). Never returns ciphertext.

post.description: Store an encrypted vault item. Server stores opaque ciphertext only.
Fetch multiple secrets by name hashes. Used by SDK for schema manifest loading.

get.description: Retrieve a single encrypted secret by name hash.

put.description: Update ciphertext and nonce. Version auto-incremented.

delete.description: Remove a secret from the vault.

post.description: Revert a secret to a previous version. The current version is archived first.

get.description: Show version history for a secret. Returns version numbers and timestamps.
Returns the token name, creator, project, environment, and permission.
List secret metadata (name hash, version, updated_at). Never returns ciphertext.

post.description: Store an encrypted vault item. Server stores opaque ciphertext only.
Fetch multiple secrets by name hashes. Used by SDK for schema manifest loading.

get.description: Retrieve a single encrypted secret by name hash.

put.description: Update ciphertext and nonce. Version auto-incremented.

delete.description: Remove a secret from the vault.

post.description: Revert a secret to a previous version. The current version is archived first.

get.description: Show version history for a secret. Returns version numbers and timestamps.
List all tokens for a project. Never exposes token hash or plaintext.

post.description: Generate a scoped service token. Plaintext shown once, SHA-256 hashed before storage.

delete.description: Marks a service token as revoked. Immediate effect.

wrapped_project_dek.description: base64 — Project DEK wrapped with Project KEK

wrapped_project_vault_key.description: base64 — Project Vault Key wrapped with user's public key

recovery_wrapped_dek.description: base64, optional — DEK wrapped with recovery key
